svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 700px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Git sparse-checkout cone mode の動作原理（例: tier1-rust-dev）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 63px; margin-left: 700px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: cone mode は「祖先パス + 指定ディレクトリ配下 + ルート直下ファイル」の 3 種を展開する。兄弟ディレクトリは展開しない。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(30, 30, 30), rgb(211, 211, 211)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(30, 30, 30), rgb(211, 211, 211));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1306px; height: 1px; padding-top: 114px; margin-left: 54px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #d4d4d4;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#d4d4d4, #373737); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: $ git sparse-checkout set --cone src/tier1/rust src/contracts src/sdk/rust tools tests

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 152px; margin-left: 42px;

div.div:
★ 効果（tier1-rust-dev 役割の場合）
full clone: 約 3.2 GB → sparse after: 約 540 MB（≒ 83% 削減）
ファイル数: 約 180,000 → 約 24,000（≒ 87% 削減）
初期 checkout: 8 分 → 1.2 分（SSD 基準）
git 2.37+ sparse index（core.sparseCheckoutCone=true）で
さらに status/add/commit が 2〜10 倍高速化

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 426px; height: 1px; padding-top: 524px; margin-left: 914px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
★ 役割切替
./tools/sparse/checkout-role.sh tier1-rust-dev

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 687px; margin-left: 700px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: cone mode は Git 2.27+（2020/06）で安定、sparse index は 2.37+（2022/06）で安定。partial clone（--filter=blob:none）と併用して初回 clone 時間を最小化（IMP-DIR-SPARSE-132）。
